conversationInProgress: A conversation is currently in progress...
imageGenerationModelDetected: Image model detected, image tool has been automatically enabled. Default model: {{platform}}:{{model}}
slash.title: Commands
export.commandDescription: Export the current conversation to a file or clipboard
export.menuHint: Choose how to export the current conversation
export.copyDescription: Copy the conversation to your system clipboard
export.saveDescription: Save the conversation to a file in the current project

nextActions.title: Suggested next steps
nextActions.hint: Suggestions only fill the input. You decide when to send
nextActions.promptAnalyzeFailure: Analyze the failed checks for "{{topic}}". Identify the root cause, affected scope, supporting evidence, and recommended fix.
nextActions.promptRetryChecks: Retry the relevant checks for "{{topic}}". Report passed and failed items, remaining risks, and the next step.
nextActions.promptViewChanges: Review the changes made for "{{topic}}". Summarize each affected file, the purpose of the change, key differences, and impact.
nextActions.promptRunChecks: Run the necessary type, format, test, and UI checks for "{{topic}}". Summarize the results and any unresolved issues.
nextActions.promptOpenPreview: Open the latest preview for "{{topic}}". Check layout, hierarchy, spacing, responsive behavior, and interaction states.
nextActions.promptAdjustStyle: Continue refining the visual style for "{{topic}}". Focus on hierarchy, spacing, alignment, feedback states, and consistency.
nextActions.promptContinueRefine: Continue refining "{{topic}}". Expand the core approach, key steps, important details, edge cases, and actionable recommendations.
nextActions.promptGenerateChecklist: Create an actionable checklist for "{{topic}}". Organize the steps by priority and include deliverables and acceptance criteria.

confirmation.allowMCPTool: Allow execution of MCP tool "{{toolName}}" from server "{{serverName}}"?
confirmation.yesAlwaysAllowTool: Yes, always allow tool "{{toolName}}" from server "{{serverName}}"
confirmation.yesAlwaysAllowServer: Yes, always allow all tools from server "{{serverName}}"
